name: Memory of the White Forest
desc:
Take 1 "White Forest" monster from your Deck, and either add it to your hand, or if you control no monsters and your opponent activated a card or effect this turn, you can Special Summon it instead.
If this card is sent to the GY to activate a monster effect: You can Set this card.
You can only use each effect of "Memory of the White Forest" once per turn.
